blogs.title: Emotionally-AI
blogs.introduction: Emotionally-AI is an AI-powered emotional wellness platform designed to help users understand, monitor, and improve their emotional health through intelligent conversations, mood tracking, and personalized insights.
blogs.description: An AI-powered emotional wellness platform that helps users track emotions and improve mental well-being.

content.title: Research & Discovery
content.description: Research focused on understanding emotional wellness, user pain points, AI-assisted therapy, and digital mental health experiences through interviews and market analysis.

content.title: Problem Statement
content.description: Users often struggle to understand their emotional state and lack personalized tools that provide actionable mental wellness insights.

content.title: Design Process
content.description: The design process involved user flows, wireframing, UI prototyping, usability testing, accessibility improvements, and iterative feedback.

content.title: Final Solution
content.description: The final platform combines AI-powered conversations, mood tracking, analytics dashboards, journaling, and personalized wellness recommendations.
